title: Squirrel Removal in Union, NJ | Professional Wildlife Control $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Union, NJ. Licensed wildlife experts safely remove squirrels from attics, walls & chimneys. Call for fast service in Union today!
intro: Union, New Jersey residents facing squirrel intrusions need fast, professional wildlife removal services to protect their homes and families. Our experienced squirrel removal team serves all of Union, from the historic neighborhoods near Connecticut Farms to the residential areas surrounding Battle Hill. We provide comprehensive squirrel extraction, exclusion, and damage repair services throughout Union County.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of wildlife management experience to Union, NJ, with licensed technicians who understand local squirrel behavior and seasonal patterns. We offer humane removal methods, same-day emergency service, and guaranteed results with full attic restoration and prevention services to keep your Union home squirrel-free.
localContext: Union's mature tree-lined streets and mix of colonial, cape cod, and split-level homes provide ideal conditions for squirrel populations to thrive year-round. Properties near Kawameeh Park and along the Garden State Parkway corridor are particularly susceptible to squirrel entry through roof vents, soffits, and chimney caps, especially during fall and spring nesting seasons.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Union, NJ?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in Union typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, entry point sealing, and initial cleanup. Homes with multiple access points or significant attic damage may require additional restoration services.

faqs.question: What are signs of squirrels in my Union home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in your attic or walls, especially during early morning and evening hours, visible entry holes near the roofline, chewed electrical wires or insulation, squirrel droppings in the attic, and seeing squirrels entering or exiting your roof. Union homeowners should also check for damaged roof vents, torn soffit screens, and nesting materials in gutters.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Union available year-round?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide squirrel removal services throughout Union, NJ all year long, including emergency services. Squirrel activity peaks during spring (March-May) and fall (September-November) when they seek warm nesting sites, but they can invade attics during any season. We respond quickly to service calls throughout Union's neighborhoods and offer same-day appointments when available.

faqs.question: How do you remove squirrels humanely in Union?
faqs.answer: We use humane, New Jersey-compliant methods including live trapping, one-way exclusion doors, and strategic entry point sealing. Our technicians inspect your Union property to identify all access points, safely remove squirrels without harm, relocate them according to state regulations, then seal entry points with durable materials to prevent re-entry. We never use poisons or harmful methods that could endanger your family or pets.
